Issue: stationApi is a standalone axios.create() instance that entirely bypasses the shared flairapi client, so all POS device traffic misses flairapi's auth-refresh, 401 handling, request dedupe, and system-error interceptors.
Recommendation: Route station requests through flairapi with per-call header overrides for the device token instead of a separate axios instance.

Issue: staffApi is a second standalone axios.create() instance duplicating stationApi's setup, bypassing flairapi for all staff-authenticated POS/KDS write operations.
Recommendation: Consolidate into flairapi via an interceptor or per-call header override.

Issue: publicApi is a third standalone axios.create() instance for the device pairing endpoint, again bypassing the shared flairapi client.
Recommendation: Use flairapi for this call as well, since it doesn't require withCredentials/auth headers by default.

Issue: Station/POS device auth bearer tokens are read from and written to plain localStorage instead of @/misc/SecureStorage (confirmed independently at the call sites components/station/PairingScreen.tsx:42 and components/station/StationBootstrap.tsx:115), exposing session-equivalent tokens to any XSS on the page.
Recommendation: Store and read station/staff auth tokens via @/misc/SecureStorage instead of raw localStorage.

Issue: useQuery keyed on businessId has no enabled guard, so on first render with a falsy businessId the query still fires with an undefined/empty ID in the URL.
Recommendation: Add enabled: !!businessId to match every other business-scoped hook in the codebase.

Issue: The primary add-to-cart icon button on every menu item is only h-7 w-7 (28px), well under the ~36-40px minimum touch target, on the single highest-traffic mobile screen in the app (diner ordering).
Recommendation: Increase to at least h-9 w-9 (36px) to match the documented icon-button sizing.

Issue: Quantity increment/decrement/remove buttons in the POS cart are h-8 w-8 (32px), below the ~40px target needed for reliable touch input during live order entry on a POS terminal.
Recommendation: Increase to at least h-10 w-10 (40px) for touch-first POS controls.

Issue: Page directly imports and calls fetchDiscoveryProfileApiCall/fetchDiscoveryMenuApiCall inside a useSuspenseQuery instead of going through a features/ hook, violating the hard components-vs-features data layer rule.
Recommendation: Move the queryFn logic into a use*.ts feature hook and have the page call the hook.

Issue: Page directly imports fetchDiscoveryBusinessesApiCall and runs it inside useSuspenseQuery, bypassing the feature-hook layer.
Recommendation: Wrap the suspense query in a dedicated feature hook (e.g. useDiscoverySearch) and call that from the page.

Issue: Long multi-section DialogContent (staff, template, day toggles, per-day time inputs) has no max-h or overflow-y-auto so content can be clipped on short mobile viewports.
Recommendation: Add max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto to the DialogContent.

Issue: 297-line item form modal (name, category, pricing, variants) lacks max-h/overflow-y-auto making it unscrollable if it exceeds the mobile viewport height.
Recommendation: Add max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto to DialogContent like BatchCreateTableModal does.

Issue: Filter bar uses four fixed pixel widths (w-[280px], w-[180px], w-[160px], w-[200px]) that stack on mobile via flex-col but each retains its fixed width, risking overflow on narrow (320-375px) phones.
Recommendation: Use w-full sm:w-[280px] style responsive widths instead of fixed px values.

Issue: Action buttons use hardcoded Tailwind palette colors (border-green-300/text-green-700, border-blue-300, border-gray-300, border-orange-300, border-red-300) instead of design system tokens, and conditional classes are built with template literals instead of cn().
Recommendation: Map each action to semantic tokens (e.g. text-primary, text-destructive) and use cn() for the conditional layout logic.

Issue: Delete button sets variant="destructive" but then overrides with hardcoded bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white, duplicating/conflicting with the destructive token styling.
Recommendation: Remove the hardcoded classes and rely on variant="destructive" (bg-destructive) alone.

Issue: Primary "Save" button hardcodes bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 instead of using the default Button (bg-primary) styling; same pattern repeated in ValidationModal.tsx:275, ValidationModal.tsx:296, AbsenceManagementTab.tsx:53, AttendanceNotesModal.tsx:64.
Recommendation: Drop the hardcoded indigo classes and use the default primary Button variant so it follows theme tokens.

Issue: Toggle/action buttons hardcode bg-indigo-500 hover:bg-indigo-600 instead of bg-primary token; same anti-pattern in MenuCategoryCardSortable.tsx:116, SimpleMenuCategoryCard.tsx:91/140/154/192, CreateMenuModal.tsx:158-163, MenuItemRowSortable.tsx:58, SimpleMenuItemRow.tsx:91/153.
Recommendation: Replace all hardcoded indigo-* classes with primary/token-based classes (bg-primary, text-primary).

Issue: Row background/border/text use raw zinc palette (bg-zinc-50, border-zinc-200, text-zinc-800, text-zinc-500) instead of bg-muted/border-border/text-foreground/text-muted-foreground tokens; same pattern across MenuCategoryCard.tsx, MenuCategoryCardSortable.tsx, SimpleMenuCategoryCard.tsx, DNDSortableCategories.tsx:219, CreateMenuModal.tsx.
Recommendation: Swap zinc-* utilities for the equivalent semantic tokens (bg-muted, border-border, text-foreground, text-muted-foreground).

Issue: The bottom sheet uses a pb-safe class for the iOS home-indicator safe area but no such Tailwind utility is defined anywhere in the project (no safe-area plugin/theme entry), so it is a dead class and the Add-to-order CTA gets no real safe-area padding.
Recommendation: Add a real safe-area utility (e.g. style={{paddingBottom: 'env(safe-area-inset-bottom)'}} or a configured pb-safe plugin) to the sheet.

Issue: The search submit button is hidden md:flex, leaving mobile users with no visible way to trigger search besides the keyboard Enter key.
Recommendation: Show a visible search icon-button on mobile (e.g. inside the input) instead of hiding the only CTA.

Issue: Card and its hover states use hardcoded zinc/blue Tailwind palette (border-zinc-200, group-hover:border-blue-200, text-zinc-900, text-zinc-500, bg-blue-50 text-blue-600) instead of design tokens, so this heavily-reused job board card won't adapt in dark mode and doesn't match the app's primary brand color.
Recommendation: Replace with border-border, text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, hover:border-primary/30, hover:text-primary, bg-primary/10 text-primary.

Issue: Session row background uses bg-white border-gray-200 (and bg-green-50 border-green-200) hardcoded, which will not adapt at all in dark mode since bg-white is a raw color, not a token.
Recommendation: Replace with bg-card border-border and a token-based success state instead of raw green-50/200.

Issue: Dialog contains a map, radius slider and switches with no max-h or overflow-y-auto on DialogContent so it can overflow the viewport on short/phone screens.
Recommendation: Add max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto to the DialogContent like other modals in the codebase.

Issue: Refresh icon button on the Orders view is h-7 w-7 (28px), too small for a touch-first tablet POS.
Recommendation: Increase to h-10 w-10 minimum for tablet touch targets.

Issue: Refresh icon button on the Tables view is h-7 w-7 (28px), too small for reliable touch on POS tablet.
Recommendation: Increase to h-10 w-10 minimum for tablet touch targets.

Issue: Back navigation button in the phone order-taking flow is only h-7 w-7 (28px), a small target for staff using personal phones.
Recommendation: Increase to at least h-9 w-9 (36px+) for phone touch targets.

Issue: useEffect directly calls staffApi.get to fetch clock-in status instead of using TanStack Query, bypassing caching/retry/error handling for a critical staff clock-in workflow.
Recommendation: Convert fetchStatus to a useQuery hook (e.g. useAttendanceStatus) with mutations for clock actions.

Issue: Station bootstrap (station/me, station/menu, station/tables) is fetched with Promise.all inside an async function triggered from useEffect rather than TanStack Query.
Recommendation: Move to parallel useQuery calls or a single useQuery with select, enabling caching and background refetch.

Issue: Modal is built almost entirely with hardcoded zinc/indigo palette (bg-zinc-50, text-zinc-600, bg-indigo-100, text-indigo-600, hover:shadow-indigo-500/20) instead of bg-card/text-muted-foreground/text-primary tokens.
Recommendation: Rework to use design tokens so the upgrade modal follows the same theme as the rest of the app.

Issue: Search/select/menu list use a hardcoded gray/amber palette throughout (border-gray-300, focus:ring-amber-500, bg-white, border-gray-200, text-gray-700/800/900) instead of border-border/ring-ring/bg-card/text-foreground tokens.
Recommendation: Replace hardcoded gray/amber classes with design-system tokens for consistency and dark-mode support.

Issue: KDS ticket cards and most of the screen use a pervasive hardcoded slate-* palette (bg-white, border-slate-300, text-slate-900, bg-slate-100) instead of card/border/foreground tokens, effectively hardcoding a light theme.
Recommendation: Migrate to bg-card/border-border/text-foreground tokens so KDS respects the same token system as the rest of the app.

Issue: Custom timeout: 30000 set on an axios instance outside lib/flairapi.ts, duplicated across all three exported instances, violating the rule that only per-call Timeouts.SHORT-style overrides are allowed outside flairapi.ts.
Recommendation: Remove custom global timeout config or move this into flairapi's shared config.

Issue: getSupportCategories uses global fetch() instead of the shared flairapi instance, bypassing auth headers, error handling, and request dedupe.
Recommendation: Replace fetch with flairapi.get so this call gets the standard interceptors and error handling.

Issue: submitSupportTicket uses global fetch() with manual JSON handling instead of flairapi.post, bypassing centralized error/toast handling.
Recommendation: Replace fetch with flairapi.post.

Issue: regenerateBackupCodesApiCall uses global fetch() with credentials: 'include' instead of flairapi, bypassing the shared axios instance entirely for this call while every other function in the same file uses flairapi.
Recommendation: Replace with flairapi.post(regenerateBackupCodesUrl, undefined, { responseType: 'blob' }), matching the pattern already used in features/qr/service.ts for blob downloads.

Issue: reorderStationOrderApiCall dynamically imports staffApi from features/station/station-api and calls a bare path '/station/orders/.../reorder' instead of using the shared flairapi instance used by every other function in this file.
Recommendation: Expose a flairapi-based call here, or if station auth headers are required, add them as a per-call header override on flairapi rather than importing a separate axios instance.

Issue: Page directly imports fetchPublicJobsApiCall and calls it inside useSuspenseQuery, the same anti-pattern repeated a third time across public listing pages.
Recommendation: Extract a shared useSuspensePublicJobs-style feature hook so all three SSR listing pages follow the same rule.

Issue: Page imports resetPasswordApiCall directly from features/auth/service and calls it in the Formik onSubmit, with error/success business logic living in the page.
Recommendation: Create a useResetPassword feature hook that owns the API call and result state.

Issue: Page imports forgotPasswordApiCall directly from features/auth/service and calls it in the Formik onSubmit.
Recommendation: Create a useForgotPassword feature hook that owns the API call and result state.

Issue: Page imports checkTfaApiCall directly from features/profileSettings/service and calls it in handleVerify, business logic embedded in the page.
Recommendation: Move the OTP verification call into a useTfa feature hook.

Issue: Guard redirects to /login?returnTo=/jobs/my-applications but login's guard/page only ever reads the origin query param, so returnTo is silently ignored and the user is dropped on /feed after login instead of returning to their applications; a near-identical guard exists in @applicationId/+guard.ts with the same bug.
Recommendation: Standardize all guards on the origin= convention used by every other protected route.

Issue: Guard redirects unauthenticated users to plain /login with no origin/returnTo at all, so post-login they lose their destination entirely -- a third divergent variant of the same login-redirect guard logic.
Recommendation: Use the shared origin= redirect convention like pages/join/+guard.ts and manage guards.

Issue: Four large inline component definitions (PairingCodeDialog, StationCard, KitchenStationCard, CategoryRoutingPanel) totaling roughly 500 lines are defined directly inside a 900-line +Page.tsx instead of components/.
Recommendation: Extract each into components/management/stations/*.tsx.

Issue: TaskFormDialog, StatusUpdateDialog and TaskCard are ~350 combined lines of inline JSX components defined in the +Page.tsx rather than components/.
Recommendation: Extract to components/management/tasks/*.tsx.

Issue: Content area is offset with mt-16 and height calc(100vh - 64px) but the sticky LandingHeader it sits under is h-20 (80px), leaving 16px of content permanently hidden/overlapped behind the fixed header.
Recommendation: Change offsets to mt-20 / calc(100vh - 80px) to match the h-20 header.

Issue: Summary stat row uses a fixed grid-cols-3 with no responsive breakpoint, unlike the grid two lines below it at 830 which is properly responsive, squeezing 3 stat cards into unreadable columns on tablet/mobile widths.
Recommendation: Add grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 (or similar) to match the pattern used elsewhere in the same file.

Issue: Recurring shift rule dialog with multiple grid rows and day selectors has no max-h/overflow-y-auto for short viewports.
Recommendation: Add max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto to DialogContent.

Issue: Bulk schedule creation dialog has no max-h/overflow-y-auto despite multiple form sections.
Recommendation: Add max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto to DialogContent.

Issue: Edit reservation dialog with three stacked grid-cols-2 rows has no max-h/overflow-y-auto.
Recommendation: Add max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto to DialogContent.

Issue: Tax rule create/edit DialogContent (and two others in this file at 504, 591) omit max-h/overflow-y-auto for potentially long tax forms.
Recommendation: Add max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto to each DialogContent.

Issue: DatePickerWithRange hardcoded to w-[280px] with no responsive/mobile override in a filter row.
Recommendation: Make the date picker w-full on mobile and constrain width only at sm breakpoint.

Issue: Header content container uses fixed px-6 padding instead of the documented responsive px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pattern.
Recommendation: Replace px-6 with px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 to match design system page padding convention.

Issue: Category reorder up/down buttons are h-6 w-6 (24px), well under the ~36-40px touch target guideline on a card meant to be used on mobile.
Recommendation: Increase to at least h-9 w-9 or size="icon" default for touch-friendly tap targets.

Issue: View-reservation icon buttons are h-7 w-7 (28px), below the recommended touch target size, repeated at lines 337 and 398.
Recommendation: Bump to h-9 w-9 or use Button size="icon" for adequate tap targets.

Issue: Page header row (title+description plus "New Discount" button) uses flex items-center justify-between with no flex-col fallback for mobile, unlike sibling ReservationDashboard which uses flex-col sm:flex-row.
Recommendation: Use flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-3 to stack on mobile.

Issue: Table component used inside a dialog for table assignment has no explicit max-h/overflow guard beyond the base Table's overflow-auto, risking a very tall dialog on mobile with many tables.
Recommendation: Wrap the table list in a max-h-[50vh] overflow-y-auto container inside the dialog.

Issue: Required-field asterisks use hardcoded text-red-500 instead of the text-destructive token, repeated across ~28 files and 65 occurrences (e.g. MenuItemRow.tsx, InventoryItemModal.tsx, JobForm.tsx).
Recommendation: Replace text-red-500/600 and bg-red-500/600 usages with text-destructive/bg-destructive tokens.

Issue: Icon and label use hardcoded text-gray-500/text-gray-700 instead of text-muted-foreground/text-foreground tokens, same in BusinessTagsInput.tsx:47, LocationPlaceholderCard.tsx:17, BusinessBrandingGalleryUpload.tsx:209, BusinessBrandingLogoUpload.tsx:56.
Recommendation: Use text-muted-foreground / text-foreground tokens instead of raw gray-* classes.

Issue: Scan-line animation uses hardcoded hex color #4ade80 in a raw <style> block instead of a design token.
Recommendation: Use an existing token (e.g. var(--primary) or a success token) instead of the raw hex value.

Issue: Cards use rounded-2xl (also line 145) which deviates from the documented rounded-xl card convention; same deviation in BusinessReviewsDashboard.tsx:136 and ChangePlanModal.tsx:89.
Recommendation: Standardize on rounded-xl for card components per the design system.

Issue: Page h1 uses text-3xl with no responsive variant while sibling pages use text-2xl, and neither follows the documented mobile-first pattern; same text-3xl inconsistency in PayrollPage.tsx:190, TipPoolingPage.tsx:120, SiteBuilderManager.tsx:134.
Recommendation: Standardize page headers to text-xl sm:text-2xl (or sm:text-3xl) across all management pages.

Issue: Stat tile colors are hardcoded (bg-gray-100 text-gray-600, bg-blue-100, bg-green-100, bg-orange-100, bg-red-100) instead of theme tokens.
Recommendation: Define semantic status tokens or reuse existing chart/status tokens instead of raw Tailwind palette colors.

Issue: MenuItemRow.tsx, MenuItemRowSortable.tsx and SimpleMenuItemRow.tsx are three near-duplicate implementations of the same "menu item row" concept (935 combined lines across the 6 menu row/card files), causing divergent styling and tokens between them.
Recommendation: Consolidate into a single configurable MenuItemRow component to avoid drift in styling/consistency.

Issue: Quantity stepper minus/plus buttons in the item customization sheet are h-8 w-8 (32px), below the recommended mobile touch target size.
Recommendation: Bump to h-9 w-9 or larger for easier tapping while holding a phone.

Issue: Floating cart button is fixed bottom-24 with no accounting for iOS safe-area-inset-bottom, so it can sit awkwardly close to or under the home-indicator gesture area.
Recommendation: Add safe-area padding/offset to fixed bottom-positioned elements in diner mode.

Issue: Fixed bottom-6 banner has no safe-area-inset-bottom handling.
Recommendation: Add safe-area padding consistent with other fixed bottom overlays.

Issue: DialogContent has no max-h/overflow-y-auto, so on a small phone in landscape or with the nearby-orders location panel expanded the dialog content can overflow the viewport.
Recommendation: Add max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto like BusinessDetailsReserveTableModal does.

Issue: ApplyModal's DialogContent has no max-h/overflow-y-auto; cover letter textarea plus resume options can exceed viewport height on small phones especially with the keyboard open.
Recommendation: Add max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto to the DialogContent.

Issue: The editorial image pair wrapper only has flex (no flex-col fallback), so the documented w-[45%]/w-[55%] image split renders as two narrow side-by-side columns even on the smallest phones.
Recommendation: Add a flex-col sm:flex-row (or similar) breakpoint so images can stack on very narrow viewports.

Issue: The clickable link wrapper around business name/description has no min-w-0, and the name has no truncate/line-clamp, unlike the sibling ProfileReservationCard which does both -- long business names can overflow the card on narrow phones.
Recommendation: Add min-w-0 to the flex wrapper and truncate (or line-clamp-1) to the name, matching ProfileReservationCard's pattern.

Issue: Page container uses max-w-[1400px] which exceeds the documented max-w-7xl (1280px) cap; DESIGN_SYSTEM.md explicitly lists "go wider than 1280px" as a Don't.
Recommendation: Change to max-w-7xl to match the rest of the app.

Issue: Top-level wrapper is a plain div with py-16 px-4 instead of the documented section + max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pattern, and double-applies horizontal padding via a nested px-4 sm:px-6.
Recommendation: Refactor to follow the documented section/container structure.

Issue: Section wrapper uses div className="... py-16 px-4" instead of the documented section + max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 container convention.
Recommendation: Align with the documented section structure used by FeaturesSection/StaffManagementFeature.

Issue: Footer meta text uses text-zinc-400/text-zinc-50 instead of muted-foreground/border tokens.
Recommendation: Replace with text-muted-foreground and border-border/50.

Issue: EVENT_ICON_CLASS map hardcodes raw Tailwind colors (bg-blue-100, bg-purple-100, bg-yellow-100, bg-green-100, bg-red-100, bg-zinc-100, bg-indigo-100, bg-emerald-100) for status icons instead of design tokens.
Recommendation: Introduce semantic status tokens or reuse existing badge color patterns consistently instead of ad hoc palette values.

Issue: Recharts Line stroke is hardcoded to hex #2563eb instead of using the primary CSS token.
Recommendation: Use a CSS var (e.g. stroke="hsl(var(--primary))") so the chart line follows theme/dark-mode changes.

Issue: "I'm running late" button uses hardcoded border-amber-300 text-amber-700 hover:bg-amber-50 instead of a token-based warning style.
Recommendation: Define/use a token-based warning variant instead of raw amber-300/700/50.

Issue: "Request cancellation" trigger button uses hardcoded border-red-300 text-red-700 hover:bg-red-50 instead of the existing --destructive token.
Recommendation: Use text-destructive border-destructive/30 hover:bg-destructive/10 to match the design system's error color.

Issue: Orphaned/unused layout component passes props that don't match its children's real interfaces (reservation to DinerModeHeader which only accepts tableLabel; allowOrders to DinerMenuTab which only accepts canOrder; missing props for DinerMyOrderTab) -- would fail type-checking if it were ever wired up. Actual diner pages use pages/diner/@businessId/+Layout.tsx instead.
Recommendation: Delete this orphaned component, or fix its prop usage to match the real child component interfaces.

Issue: PopoverContent is fixed at w-80 (320px) with no max-w-[90vw] cap so it can overflow the viewport on narrow phones.
Recommendation: Cap width with a responsive class e.g. w-80 max-w-[90vw].

Issue: Check-count selector buttons are w-8 h-8 (32px), under the recommended touch target size for POS tablet use.
Recommendation: Increase to h-10 w-10 for touch-first split-bill configuration.

Issue: Confirm-payment DialogContent uses overflow-hidden with no max-h/overflow-y-auto, so expanding Discount/Split panels plus keypad can get clipped instead of scrolling.
Recommendation: Replace overflow-hidden with max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto so nested panels can scroll.

Issue: Expo order feed is polled via setInterval inside useEffect calling staffApi.get directly instead of useQuery's refetchInterval.
Recommendation: Use useQuery({queryKey:['kds-orders','expo'], refetchInterval: 12000}) for consistency with project data-fetching rules.

Issue: Six imports use relative paths ('../ui/alert', '../ui/button', etc.) instead of the '@/' alias used everywhere else in the codebase.
Recommendation: Change to '@/components/ui/...' imports for consistency.

Issue: Debounced address search calls Radar.autocomplete() directly inside useEffect rather than through TanStack Query.
Recommendation: Wrap in a useQuery with a debounced/enabled key, or a dedicated mutation hook.

Issue: Wrapping div uses a large style={{ all: 'revert', ... }} inline style object that fully bypasses Tailwind/cn(), duplicating classes already set via className.
Recommendation: Remove the inline style reset and rely on Tailwind classes/cn() only.

Issue: useEffect depends on the whole props object, so LemonSqueezy.Url.Open can re-fire on every unrelated parent re-render, not just when url changes.
Recommendation: Depend on props.url specifically instead of the whole props object.

Issue: Chart line/dot colors are hardcoded hex (#4F46E5) instead of a CSS design token.
Recommendation: Reference a chart color CSS variable (e.g. hsl(var(--chart-1))) as set up in components/ui/chart.tsx.

Issue: Bar fill color hardcoded as #4F46E5 instead of a design token.
Recommendation: Use a chart CSS variable for consistency with the token system.

Issue: Pie chart COLORS array is hardcoded hex values (#4F46E5, #10B981, #F59E0B) instead of design tokens.
Recommendation: Source colors from CSS chart variables instead of a hardcoded array.

Issue: Table uses hardcoded zinc-* palette with manual dark: variants (text-zinc-700, bg-zinc-50 dark:bg-zinc-800) instead of semantic tokens like text-muted-foreground/bg-muted.
Recommendation: Replace zinc-* utility classes with token-based classes so theming stays consistent.

Issue: KPI card labels/values use hardcoded zinc-* colors (text-zinc-600 dark:text-zinc-400, text-zinc-900 dark:text-zinc-100) instead of text-muted-foreground/text-foreground tokens.
Recommendation: Replace with semantic text tokens.

Issue: Pricing cards use rounded-3xl and the dialog uses rounded-2xl, deviating from the documented rounded-xl card / rounded-lg standard.
Recommendation: Align to rounded-xl for cards per design system.

Issue: Confirm button colors are hardcoded (bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700, bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700) instead of using bg-destructive/bg-primary tokens.
Recommendation: Use variant="destructive" / default Button variants instead of raw hex-mapped Tailwind colors.

Issue: Pairing screen hardcodes bg-slate-50/text-slate-900/border-slate-200 instead of using bg-background/text-foreground/border-border tokens.
Recommendation: Replace slate-* classes with semantic tokens.

Issue: Expo tickets use bg-white and text-slate-500 hardcoded colors instead of bg-card/text-muted-foreground tokens.
Recommendation: Replace hardcoded colors with design tokens.

Issue: logoutUserApiCall passes withCredentials: true as a per-call axios config, which the rules say should not be set outside lib/flairapi.ts (flairapi already sets withCredentials: true globally).
Recommendation: Remove the redundant withCredentials override since flairapi already sets it globally.

Issue: EventSource is constructed with { withCredentials: true } directly against the literal API base outside flairapi.ts; this duplicates auth/session wiring outside the centralized client.
Recommendation: Consider centralizing SSE connection setup/config alongside flairapi conventions, or document this as an accepted exception.

Issue: useNotificationSocket's useEffect directly calls registerDeviceTokenApiCall/removeDeviceTokenByDeviceIdApiCall instead of wrapping the device-token registration in useMutation, bypassing TanStack Query for this API call.
Recommendation: Wrap the device-token register/unregister calls in useMutation, keeping only the FCM/SSE wiring itself in useEffect.

Issue: Relative import goes up two directory levels ("../../shared/api-response") instead of using the @/ alias used everywhere else.
Recommendation: Change to import { unwrap } from "@/features/shared/api-response".

Issue: Relative import goes up two directory levels ("../../shared/api-response") instead of the @/ alias convention used elsewhere in the codebase.
Recommendation: Change to import { unwrap } from "@/features/shared/api-response".

Issue: Relative import goes up two directory levels ("../../shared/api-response") instead of the @/ alias convention.
Recommendation: Change to import { unwrap } from "@/features/shared/api-response".

Issue: StatusUpdateDialog and TaskCard are near-duplicate copies of the same components defined independently in the owner tasks page, risking behavior drift.
Recommendation: Share one component between owner and staff task pages instead of maintaining two copies.

Issue: TutorialContent (~146 lines) and TutorialSidebar (~117 lines, line 94) are large inline components defined inside +Page.tsx rather than components/.
Recommendation: Extract TutorialContent and TutorialSidebar into components/learn/*.tsx.

Issue: ApplicationsTab (~134 lines) and InvitationsTab (~110 lines, line 199) are large inline tab components defined directly in the +Page.tsx.
Recommendation: Extract into components/profile/jobs/*.tsx.

Issue: Fixed bottom navigation bar has no safe-area-inset-bottom padding, so on notched iPhones the nav can sit flush against/behind the home-indicator gesture area.
Recommendation: Add pb-[env(safe-area-inset-bottom)] (or equivalent) to the nav container.

Issue: Auth pages (login, signup, forgot-password, reset-password) hardcode bg-white text-zinc-900 and inline hex colors (#6366F1/#5859E9) instead of the design system's bg-background/text-foreground/primary tokens.
Recommendation: Replace hardcoded colors/hex values with semantic Tailwind tokens so auth pages respect theme/dark mode like the rest of the app.

Issue: Same hardcoded #6366F1 hex color and zinc palette pattern duplicated from login/reset/forgot-password pages.
Recommendation: Consolidate into a shared AuthLayout using design tokens.

Issue: Page-level container uses max-w-5xl with fixed px-6 instead of the design system's specified max-w-7xl and responsive px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8.
Recommendation: Align container width/padding with DESIGN_SYSTEM.md spec.

Issue: Page-level container uses max-w-5xl with fixed px-6 instead of the documented max-w-7xl / px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pattern, same as privacy and gdpr pages.
Recommendation: Align container width/padding with DESIGN_SYSTEM.md spec.

Issue: Page-level container uses max-w-5xl with fixed px-6 instead of the documented max-w-7xl / px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pattern.
Recommendation: Align container width/padding with DESIGN_SYSTEM.md spec.

Issue: Two-factor page mixes verification API-call logic and logout handling directly in the component body alongside the direct service import noted separately.
Recommendation: Consolidate into the same feature hook used to fix the direct service import.

Issue: Page reads/removes an auth-related flag (auth_logout_reason) directly via localStorage instead of the SecureStorage abstraction.
Recommendation: Route this through @/misc/SecureStorage like other auth/session data.

Issue: Root container uses fixed p-8 padding and min-h-screen instead of responsive page padding, and h1 uses text-3xl with no smaller mobile variant.
Recommendation: Use px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 padding and text-2xl sm:text-3xl for the heading.

Issue: grid-cols-4 label/input rows inside a sm:max-w-[425px] dialog have no mobile-specific fallback (label gets very cramped at narrow widths), repeated pattern across many schedule/reservation modals.
Recommendation: Consider grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-4 or stacking label above input below sm breakpoint.

Issue: QR code container is fixed h-[200px] w-[200px] with no responsive scaling for very small viewports.
Recommendation: Use a responsive size e.g. h-40 w-40 sm:h-[200px] sm:w-[200px].

Issue: TabsList uses grid-cols-4 with w-full and no responsive fallback, tab labels can be cramped on narrow dialog widths.
Recommendation: Consider a 2-column grid on very small screens or shrink label text with truncate.

Issue: Row hover containers use rounded-sm (repeated at lines 89, 103, 120, 134, 148, 163, 188, 200) which is the input-radius convention, inconsistent with sibling rows elsewhere that use rounded-md/lg.
Recommendation: Use rounded-md for row hover backgrounds to align with convention.

Issue: Conditional classNames are built with template literals instead of the cn() helper (also lines 169, 175, 180).
Recommendation: Refactor to cn() from @/lib/utils for conditional class composition.

Issue: Conditional className built via template literal string interpolation instead of cn(), and step text falls back to hardcoded text-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-100 rather than a token.
Recommendation: Use cn() for the conditional classes and text-foreground for the base color.

Issue: colorCode default fallback hardcodes "#000000" rather than referencing a token/default swatch consistent with ShiftTemplateModal.tsx:34.
Recommendation: Define a shared default color constant sourced from the palette instead of duplicating hex literals.

Issue: Inline style={{ backgroundColor: template.colorCode || '#ccc' }} hardcodes a fallback gray hex instead of a token.
Recommendation: Fall back to a CSS variable/token (e.g. var(--muted)) instead of a raw hex value.

Issue: Same hardcoded '#ccc' fallback color pattern as ManagerScheduleShiftsTab.tsx, duplicated logic increases risk of future drift from tokens.
Recommendation: Centralize the fallback color as a shared constant tied to a design token.

Issue: Relative import goes up two directory levels (../../ClientOnly) instead of using the @/ path alias required by project conventions.
Recommendation: Change to import { ClientOnly } from "@/components/ClientOnly".

Issue: Raw native <input type="radio"> elements are used instead of the shadcn RadioGroup/RadioGroupItem primitives used elsewhere in the codebase.
Recommendation: Replace with @/components/ui/radio-group for consistent styling and accessibility.

Issue: Directly reads/writes localStorage for dismiss-state instead of going through the project's storage abstraction.
Recommendation: Route through @/misc/SecureStorage (or a dedicated local UI-prefs helper) rather than calling localStorage directly.

Issue: Component renders hardcoded placeholder chartData ("Septembner 2025" typo) instead of wiring to real query data, and appears to be leftover scaffold code still present in the management directory.
Recommendation: Wire the chart to a real useQuery hook or remove the unused placeholder component.

Issue: Same as DashboardOrdersGraph.tsx: hardcoded mock chart data left in place rather than fetched via TanStack Query.
Recommendation: Wire to real query data or remove if unused.

Issue: Fixed bottom-6 seated-reservation nudge has no safe-area-inset-bottom handling.
Recommendation: Add safe-area padding for iOS devices with a home indicator.

Issue: Notification matrix uses a fixed grid-cols-[1fr_repeat(3,3.5rem)] with no smaller-screen adjustment; long labels combined with three 56px switch columns leave very little width for the label on narrow phones.
Recommendation: Consider stacking channel columns or shrinking column width further on small screens.

Issue: Exit ("X") button in the diner header uses the default icon Button size with a w-4 h-4 icon; combined with the shrink-0 logo it's a fairly small tap target for the header's only navigation action on a phone.
Recommendation: Verify the rendered size is at least 36-40px, or bump to size-10 for a more comfortable header exit tap target.

Issue: Pre-order quantity +/- buttons in the reservation modal are h-7 w-7 (28px), a small touch target inside an already narrow accordion row.
Recommendation: Increase to at least 32-36px for easier tapping.

Issue: Same non-conforming py-16 px-4 wrapper pattern instead of the documented section/container structure.
Recommendation: Align with the documented section structure.

Issue: Outer container uses py-16 sm:py-20 (missing md:py-24) and px-4 sm:px-8 instead of the documented py-16 md:py-24 / px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 scale.
Recommendation: Align spacing scale with DESIGN_SYSTEM.md section convention.

Issue: Date/time and guest pickers use raw native <select> elements with custom appearance-none styling instead of the shadcn Select component used elsewhere in the app.
Recommendation: Replace with the shared Select/SelectTrigger/SelectContent components for consistent styling and keyboard/a11y behavior.

Issue: In-stock badge uses hardcoded bg-green-500/15 text-green-500 instead of a design token.
Recommendation: Use a token-based success color or align with other "available/in stock" badges in the app.

Issue: Hero section uses container mx-auto px-4 instead of the documented max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 container pattern.
Recommendation: Align container/padding with the documented section structure.

Issue: isHighlighted plan uses bg-gradient-to-b from-[#8A89F9] to-[#6366F1] and ring-[#8A89F9]/50 -- sanctioned exception hexes per DESIGN_SYSTEM.md, but duplicated literally in two places without a shared token/class.
Recommendation: Extract the featured-card gradient/ring into a reusable class or CSS variable to avoid drift between copies.

Issue: Terminal-state banners use hardcoded bg-green-50 border-green-200 text-green-800 and bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200 text-emerald-800 rather than tokens.
Recommendation: Consolidate to a token-based success style.

Issue: Floor-plan canvas wrapper uses bg-slate-50 (raw Tailwind gray) instead of a bg-muted token for its background.
Recommendation: Use bg-muted for the canvas background to stay consistent with token usage elsewhere.

Issue: Orphaned duplicate file (237 lines) with a space in its filename, not imported anywhere in the codebase.
Recommendation: Delete the stale copy; it is leftover cruft that risks confusing future edits.

Issue: Leftover console.log debug statement in handleDisconnect.
Recommendation: Remove the console.log before shipping.

Issue: useEffect is used for a purely visual anime.js entrance animation (not data fetching), which is fine, but the effect's cleanup pattern (scope.current.revert() without an optional-chaining guard) differs from the ref-guarded pattern used in every other landing animation component.
Recommendation: Align with the scope.current?.revert() pattern used elsewhere for consistency.

Issue: QR code is rendered at a fixed size={200} instead of scaling with container width like QrcodePopup does.
Recommendation: Use a responsive width (e.g. width:100%, maxWidth) as done in components/shared/QrcodePopup.tsx.

Issue: Full-height loading/error screens force min-h-screen with no accounting for tablet safe-areas, acceptable for kiosk but worth confirming with device chrome.
Recommendation: Verify safe-area padding on kiosk browser chrome if applicable.

Issue: OrderCart panel has no defined width and relies entirely on parent flex sizing; on very narrow layouts (station split view) totals/buttons could compress without a documented min-width fallback.
Recommendation: Confirm a sensible min-w on the cart column for narrow viewport/split-screen station layouts.

Issue: Conditional classNames built with template-literal string concatenation instead of cn() from @/lib/utils.
Recommendation: Use cn("p-4 flex gap-4 ...", !isRead && "bg-muted/20").

Issue: Conditional classNames built with template-literal string concatenation instead of cn().
Recommendation: Use cn() for conditional classes as elsewhere in the codebase.

Issue: Numpad button classNames use template-literal concatenation instead of cn().
Recommendation: Use cn() for conditional classes.

Issue: Multiple leftover console.log debug statements left in production code.
Recommendation: Remove debug console.log calls.

Issue: Icon visually resized via a scale-75 transform hack instead of using the smaller Lucide size class directly.
Recommendation: Use an explicit w-4 h-4 icon variant instead of CSS-scaling a w-5 h-5 icon.

Issue: SelectTrigger uses hardcoded bg-white dark:bg-zinc-950 instead of bg-card/bg-background token.
Recommendation: Use bg-card or remove the override to inherit token-based styling.

Issue: Product card uses rounded-2xl while the design system specifies rounded-xl for cards.
Recommendation: Use rounded-xl to match documented card radius.

Issue: Popover confirmation text uses text-zinc-500/text-zinc-600 instead of text-muted-foreground token.
Recommendation: Replace with text-muted-foreground for token consistency.

Issue: Autocomplete dropdown uses hardcoded bg-white instead of bg-popover/bg-card token, so it won't adapt in dark mode.
Recommendation: Use bg-popover to match other dropdown surfaces.

Issue: Card uses shadow-sm, an arbitrary shadow value outside the documented shadow-lg (standard) / shadow-2xl (featured) scale used elsewhere in the app.
Recommendation: Standardize on shadow-lg per design system guidance.

Issue: fcm_device_id is stored in plain localStorage rather than SecureStorage; not a bearer token itself but it's a persistent per-device identifier tied to push notification delivery for the authenticated user.
Recommendation: Consider moving to SecureStorage for consistency with other identifiers, or document why this one is exempt.

Issue: Imports AxiosError directly from 'axios' in a hook file; harmless as a type-only import but inconsistent with the pattern of never touching axios outside service.ts/flairapi.ts.
Recommendation: Consider re-exporting an app-level error-type helper instead of importing axios directly in hook files, for consistency.

Issue: Imports AxiosError directly from 'axios' in a hook file, same pattern as usePasswordSettings.ts.
Recommendation: Same as above -- consider a shared error-type wrapper instead of a direct axios import in hooks.

Issue: Leftover debug console.log of the user object left in guard code that runs on every request to this route.
Recommendation: Remove the console.log before merging.

Issue: Page uses hardcoded zinc-* utility classes (bg-white text-zinc-900, text-zinc-500, bg-zinc-100, etc.) instead of semantic muted-foreground/foreground/card tokens used elsewhere in manage/.
Recommendation: Swap zinc-* literals for bg-card/text-muted-foreground/bg-muted tokens.

Issue: Page uses hardcoded zinc-* color classes rather than the design system's semantic color tokens.
Recommendation: Swap zinc-* literals for semantic tokens for dark-mode consistency.

Issue: Page containers use max-w-6xl px-6 rather than the documented max-w-7xl px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8.
Recommendation: Align with DESIGN_SYSTEM.md spec or document the exception.

Issue: Multiple containers on this page use max-w-6xl px-6 instead of the documented max-w-7xl / responsive padding pattern.
Recommendation: Align with DESIGN_SYSTEM.md spec.

Issue: Page container uses max-w-6xl instead of the documented max-w-7xl.
Recommendation: Align with DESIGN_SYSTEM.md spec.

Issue: Container uses max-w-6xl instead of the documented max-w-7xl page width.
Recommendation: Align with DESIGN_SYSTEM.md spec.

Issue: min-w-[120px] TabsTrigger widths are duplicated verbatim in staff/staff/+Page.tsx and owner/staff/+Page.tsx instead of a shared tab-list component.
Recommendation: Extract a shared ManagementTabs component to avoid drift between owner/staff variants.

Issue: Hero section uses an unusual pt-50 md:pt-20 top padding jump (200px to 80px) rather than a smoother responsive scale, likely a byproduct of the same header-offset inconsistency seen in learn/+Page.tsx.
Recommendation: Verify against the actual LandingHeader height and use a standard offset scale (e.g. pt-24 sm:pt-20).

Issue: View-mode default is decided by reading window.innerWidth directly in a useEffect inside the page rather than via a shared responsive hook.
Recommendation: Use a shared useIsMobile-style hook (already present in hooks/use-mobile) instead of inline window.innerWidth checks.

Issue: Compose dialog's audience selector uses a fixed grid-cols-3 with no smaller-screen fallback inside a max-w-lg dialog, which is cramped on narrow phones.
Recommendation: Consider grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 for the audience picker.

Issue: Form dialogs use fixed grid-cols-2 with no responsive breakpoint.
Recommendation: Add a stacked mobile fallback (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2).
